articles.author: Aidan  Stretch
articles.title: Hungary's new leader has vowed to wean his country off Russian energy. It will be a painful transition. - CBS News
articles.description: Hungary's politics have shifted definitively away from Russia and toward Europe, but quitting a cheap Russian energy habit could be painful.
articles.content:
Kyiv – In the hours before Peter Magyar defeated Hungary's longtime leader Viktor Orbán in Sunday's landmark election, Magyar's supporters filled the streets of Budapest chanting "Russians out!"
